creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know about the man that lives inside a clock in London? He draws the time accurately on the clock face, every minute and every hour, cleaning the hands and redrawing them over and over again, 24 hours a day. 🤯

The movements are so realistic and it’s actually a video loop, by the Dutch artist, Maarten Baas. It’s called the “Maarten Baas Real Time Clock” and the man inside is dressed in a three-piece suit, busy working all day and all night. 

Have you stopped by to watch him?

📍50 Eastbourne Terrace, Paddington, London, W2 6LG
